name: How is fault determined if I asked AI about my partial blame in Houston crash?
description: Evidence-based, but AI chats can show admissions hurting you—lawyer up.[1]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined if I asked AI about my partial blame in Houston crash?

acceptedAnswer.text: Evidence-based, but AI chats can show admissions hurting you—lawyer up.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Via evidence like witnesses/police, but AI admissions weigh heavily if discovered.[1] Texas broad discovery includes AI chats per *Heppner* principles.[1] Comparative fault reduces recovery proportionally.

**Key factors:**
- AI speculation not conclusive but impeaches.
- Objective proof controls.
- 51% fault bars recovery.

Minimize via attorney narrative; delete chats, gather counter-evidence. Don't admit to AI/insurers.[1] Fault fight needs pro help.
